message:
fix: robustness improvements for edge cases and data handling

- command-palette: Only append "..." to excerpts when actually truncated,
  fallback to "Read more..." for empty excerpts
- notable-stargazers: Ensure remainingCount never goes negative with
  Math.max(0, ...) defensive check
- lib/utils: Handle invalid date strings in formatDate() by returning
  original string instead of "Invalid Date"
- three-scene-fallback: Add className prop for flexible sizing
- hero: Pass explicit height classes to ThreeSceneFallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
